en_title: Suicide Squad: Kill the Justice League Developers Wanted to Quit the Industry After the Game Was Released
cn_title: 《自杀小队》开发者称游戏发售后曾想离开行业
subtitle: 表格杀死热情
opus_summary: 两名前Rocksteady员工谈到《自杀小队：消灭正义联盟》的开发经历，称华纳要求做成服务型游戏后，团队压力转向复玩和用户参与，甚至让他们一度想离开游戏行业。

paragraphs.en: Two developers who worked on have given a transparent account of their experience working on the game.
paragraphs.cn: 两位参与《自杀小队：消灭正义联盟》的开发者，坦诚讲述了自己参与这款游戏的经历。

paragraphs.en: In a new interview with , two former Rocksteady Studio employees spoke out about the experience of working on the . Designer Johnny Armstrong noted that the team was excited to take a move on from Batman after doing three back-to-back Arkham games but, once they started working on Suicide Squad, things started to change. Warner Bros. wanted a live-service game, and that was unlike anything the studio had ever done before.
paragraphs.cn: 在一次新采访中，两名前Rocksteady Studios员工谈到了开发这款游戏的感受。设计师Johnny Armstrong指出，在连续做完三部《阿卡姆》游戏后，团队曾很兴奋终于能从蝙蝠侠转向新方向；但当他们开始制作《自杀小队》后，事情开始变化。华纳兄弟想要一款服务型游戏，而这和工作室过去做过的任何东西都不一样。

paragraphs.en: Axel Rydby, who became the game's director in 2022, noted that the prolonged development meant there was more pressure on the live-service side of the project. With seven years of production, Warner Bros. was looking to find ways to recoup its investment and began pressuring the team to maximize replayability and player engagement.
paragraphs.cn: Axel Rydby于2022年成为本作总监。他指出，漫长的开发周期意味着项目的服务型游戏部分承受了更多压力。经过七年制作，华纳兄弟希望找到收回投资的方法，于是开始向团队施压，要求最大化复玩性和玩家参与度。

paragraphs.en: “That’s when I started feeling like I wasn’t making games anymore,” he said. “I was following a spreadsheet, some elusive marketing-analysis spreadsheet that no one could present clearly. I kind of felt like this isn’t the gaming industry I wanted to work in.”
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「就是那时候，我开始觉得自己不再是在做游戏了。我是在跟着一张表走，一张没人能说清楚的、若隐若现的市场分析表。我有点觉得，这不是我想工作的游戏行业。」

paragraphs.en: Armstrong echoed similar feelings, noting that he grew disillusioned by the industry after working on Suicide Squad: Kill the Justice League.
paragraphs.cn: Armstrong也表达了类似感受。他指出，在参与《自杀小队：消灭正义联盟》后，自己对这个行业感到幻灭。

paragraphs.en: “I felt everything drained from me,” Armstrong said. “I said, ‘I can’t do this again. I don’t know if I’m done with the industry, but I’m done.’ I could feel myself coming apart at the seams.”
paragraphs.cn: Armstrong说：「我感觉一切都从我身体里被抽干了。我说，『我不能再做一次这个了。我不知道自己是不是要离开这个行业，但我结束了。』我能感觉自己正在散架。」

paragraphs.en: The two left Rocksteady and have since moved on to find something that brings back their creative spark. They recently launched a Kickstarter for their new RPG deckbuilder, Secret of Circadia, and are hoping to pull in $11,000 from backers to bring it all to life.
paragraphs.cn: 两人后来离开了Rocksteady，并开始寻找能重新点燃创作火花的东西。他们最近为自己的新RPG牌组构筑游戏《Secret of Circadia》发起Kickstarter，希望从支持者那里筹到11000美元(约合人民币7万元)，让这个项目成真。

paragraphs.en: for Rocksteady after its beloved Arkham games but, hopefully, it also sent a message to Warner Bros. about the kinds of games it should be making. We're not quite sure what Rocksteady is working on right now, but rumors suggest it is returning to Batman with its next project .
paragraphs.cn: 对Rocksteady来说，在备受喜爱的《阿卡姆》系列之后，这显然是一次沉重挫折；但希望它也向华纳兄弟传达了一个信息：它应该制作什么样的游戏。我们还不太确定Rocksteady现在正在做什么，不过传闻称，它的下一个项目将回归蝙蝠侠。

paragraphs.en: However, many of the key creatives that brought the Arkham series to life have since left the studio. Of course, Rocksteady still retains a lot of talented folks, but the next game will almost certainly be different compared to a game like Arkham Knight.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，许多让《阿卡姆》系列成形的核心创意人员如今已经离开工作室。当然，Rocksteady仍然保有许多有才华的人，但下一款游戏几乎肯定会和《阿卡姆骑士》这样的作品有所不同。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter上通过@Cade_Onder找到他。
